title: Pillow removal gate

retained_runtime_owner.fallback_rule: If thumbnail generation is unavailable or fails, the original image remains the safe fallback; thumbnail_only removes the original only after a thumbnail exists.

not_removed: scripts/start.bat Pillow dependency check and thumbnail-disabled note
routes/upload.py PIL import and thumbnail generation
routes/notes/import_.py PIL import and thumbnail generation
blocked_reason: 23.8-thumb.2 locks current Python/Pillow parity only. No Go thumbnail route/helper candidate has been implemented in go-shadow, no real go-shadow packaging smoke includes github.com/skrashevich/go-webp, and no fallback/removal strategy has been proven beyond the retained Python owner.

allowed_next_step.title: Go thumbnail local implementation candidate
allowed_next_step.summary: Add the selected Go WebP encoder only inside a flag-gated local/copied-data Go thumbnail candidate, prove parity against the 23.8-thumb.2 fixtures, run packaging smoke, and still retain Pillow until a later removal gate passes.
